description: System adjustments for logout, resurrection, mob behavior, minor War Gloves nerf, and various fixes.

sections.heading: Changes
items: Logout countdown in yellow zones reduced from 60s to 10s
Resurrect spells now expire after 10 seconds if not accepted
Furniture blockers added to World Boss areas
Guardians, Aspects, and Avalonian Gate Cores now retarget instead of resetting
New Mountain and Steppe Energy Vortex visuals added
Resource mobs cancel DoT effects on death for instant gathering
Mistcougar Pounce now applies Stun instead of DoT
sections.searchable_text: logout resurrection mobs ai gathering vortex mistcougar changes

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed Demonic Slaver chain sound looping
Corrected Crystal Spider tier spawning issue
Fixed Throwing Blades hitting multiple times incorrectly
Create Opening now reduces magic resistances correctly
Item durability now displays correctly in kill/death UI
Various graphical, terrain, UI, audio, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: fixes spiders respec daggers war gloves tooltips ui bugs
